ddls:
CREATE TABLE "historical_figures" (
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical figure */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the historical figure */,
  "historical_significance" TEXT /* Description of the historical significance of the figure */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the historical figure */,
  "birthdate" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the historical figure */,
  "deathdate" INTEGER /* Year of death of the historical figure */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place where the figure was born */,
  "place_of_death" TEXT /* Place where the figure died */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the figure */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the figure */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the figure */,
  "external_references" TEXT /* JSON array of external references (e.g., Wikipedia, biographies) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("figure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the historical figure making the contribution */,
  "field" TEXT /* Field to which the contribution was made (e.g., politics, religion, literature) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contribution */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Description of the impact of the contribution */,
  "sources" TEXT /* JSON array of sources that support the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES historical_figures ("figure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "literature" (
  "literature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each literary work */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the historical figure associated with the work */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the literary work */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year of publication of the work */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the literary work */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the literary work */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the work was written */,
  "external_references" TEXT /* JSON array of external references (e.g., book reviews, articles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("literature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_literature_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES historical_figures ("figure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "politics" (
  "politics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political role */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the historical figure in the political role */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role played by the historical figure in politics */,
  "years_active" TEXT /* Years during which the historical figure was active in politics */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the political contributions */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the political role was held */,
  "government_body" TEXT /* Specific government body where the figure was active */,
  "sources" TEXT /* JSON array of sources that support the political role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("politics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_politics_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES historical_figures ("figure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "religion" (
  "religion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each religious role */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the historical figure in the religious role */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role played by the historical figure in religion */,
  "years_active" TEXT /* Years during which the historical figure was active in religion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the religious contributions */,
  "denomination" TEXT /* Religious denomination of the figure */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the religious role was held */,
  "sources" TEXT /* JSON array of sources that support the religious role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("religion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_religion_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES historical_figures ("figure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the historical figure being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the historical figure */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the historical figure was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and device) used for the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES historical_figures ("figure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "figure_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the historical figure */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was made */,
  "revision_description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "revised_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the revision has been approved */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_figure_versions_revised_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("revised_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_figure_versions_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES historical_figures ("figure_id")
)
